properties.evidence: Elevated levels of blood lipids are well documented risk factors for cardiovascular disease. Statins are the preferred class of drugs to lower elevated low density lipoprotein cholesterol (LDL-C).
There are other classes to augment or substitute for statins, such as ezetimibe, fibrates, niacin and dietary supplements.
